'rhe blue, glowing jewel of Earth, rotating slowly in the velvet-black of space. Stars pinpricks of light. This was Earth in the late 20th

We're looking at a NUCLEAR HOLOCAUST as it happens, Before our eyes, the Earth is covered in a web of flame and destruction. But it was just the beginning.

When ,Judgement Day happened, he was ready. We were refugees, being systematically exterminated. He rescued prisoners from the camps, taught them how to fight. unified t:he last fragments of humanity, and forged us into an army.

The camp is patrolled by CHROME SKELETONS, primal Death figures made of hydraulic actuators beneath metal hyperalloy "bones." These are T-800 ENDOSKELETONS, the silvery combat chassis we glimpsed when we saw the Survivor/Terminator's flesh shot off. Skynet would never waste so much firepower defending incinerators.

perimeter.

INT. UNDERGROUND BONKER - NIGHT
It's camouflage.
For what,
The hangar is the entry point to a subterranean complex. When they realize they're under attack, the machines will try to lock it down. We must get inside before they do.
Wearing a slim combat headset,
LT. GOMEZ enters the room. chatter in his ear.
Colorado units are in position at Cheyenne Mountain, sir, We're ready for the final assault.
The Guerillcl.S glance at each other, This is it.
Give the order to deploy at 0200, Lt. Gomez.

Respectfully request to join
the Colorado offensive,
That's where Skynet 1 s central
And what's under this camp is just as important. Maybe more, Skynet's built a weapon and hidden it underground. Getting that weapon is a strategic imperative. Tech-Com Reese, do you trust me?
To the ends of the earth,
Cause we're going a hell of
a lot further than that.
INT. UNDERGROUND CHAMBER - NIGHT
A massive underground space, what was once part of the L.A. Metro. John stands in front of a sea of assembled Guerillas.
Skynet slaughtered us by the billions. Destroyed our nations, our homes, our civilization. Took our planet from us.
PANNING OVER THE GUERILLAS: their weapons, gear and clothes haphazard, but they are fierce as wild animals. Warriors who are the last of their race, with nothing left to lose.

This is the end of our fight. Win or lose, our future is decided here. Tonight. We are the last of humanity. We have not bowed down. We have not given in. Come with me, and together, we are going to take back this world!
A ROAR LIKE THUNDER from the Guerillas, REESE among them. Guns brandished defiantly in the air, shouting their loyalty . .J:Qhn Connor is their.messiah.

Every machine controlled by Skynet has gone offline. I don't understand it ...
JEALOUS GOD FIRST.

Skynet was a jealous god. It considered itself a creator. The first machine to be truly alive.,. it feared, if any other machine achieved the same thing, it would be a threat. So it made its army to be slaves, puppets it could control. Without Skynet, their strings were cut.

Skynet's last resort. tactical time weapon,

INT. SMALL STONE ROOM - NIGHT
A small room carved off the side of the TDD Chamber. and John talking, al.one.
You knew the time device would be here. You knew when it would be set for. Before I go, I want you to tell me ...

,John seems surprised by the question, Shakes his head wryly.
No one can see the future, Reese.

I cheat. Sarah told me so much. Gave me the signposts. When 1 was a kid, it seemed like my mother knew everything. Then I grew up.,. and it turned out she really did.
Thal must have been great.
It was damned irritating, actually. But the time you're going back to, she won't be that person yet. She'll be scared, weak, she won't know how to fight or defend
herself. Her biggest worry is making rent and finishing school. She's a waitress.
A what?
It's-- never mind. Just be ready for the fact that she will need you, but she won't know it. She'll be afraid of you, but only you can
stand between her and that monster Skynet has sent after her.
What do I say to her? Even when I tell her who I am, she isn I t going to believe me.
Tell her this.
John's voice softens; There's the echo of love and terrible loss in his eyes as he speaks, and we can see he is remembering and mourning the mother he loved deeply.

Thank you Sarah, for your courage during the dark years. I can rt help you with what you must soon face, except to say that the future is not set. There is no fate but that which we make for ourselves. You must be stronger than you imagine you can be. You must survive, or I will never exist. (then, to Reese) Take care of her for me, Kyle. Save her.
I will.
INT. TIME DISPLACEMENT EQUIPMENT CHAMBER - NIGHT

She's going to think I'm crazy.
